summary: Final verification testing completed successfully. All backend APIs working perfectly (13/13 tests passed). Frontend fully functional with all English localization now complete. Fixed remaining Russian text in SuccessModal and AdminPanel toast messages.
passed_tests: All backend API endpoints (13/13 tests passed)
Homepage loads with English text and NFT avatar image
Countdown timer shows days/hours/minutes/seconds until March 31, 2026
Progress bar displays token sale progress correctly
Token quantity input accepts numbers and calculates total cost
Admin Panel button (⚙️) accessible in bottom-left corner
Admin Panel shows filter tabs: All/Pending/Confirmed/Failed
Admin Panel table headers in English: ID, Wallet, Network, Quantity ARA, Amount, Status, Actions
Footer has language selector (EN/RU/ES) with English default
Features section displays content in English
All wallet selection and UI interactions working correctly
